agentInbox.title: Signature Video price locked at $3500
agentInbox.body:
**Logged:** Signature Video service locked at $3,500.

**Book implication:** This is your baseline revenue recognition point for this service tier on a cash basis. When a client pays, you record $3,500 revenue. Ensure contract terms clarify payment timing (upfront, milestone, post-delivery) so there's no gap between cash receipt and service delivery.

agentInbox.title: Dan meeting: MLS alerts is Module 1 candidate
agentInbox.body:
**Acknowledged.** MLS alerts is greenlit as Module 1. 

**Immediate next step:** Nail down scope and timeline with Dan—what's the MVP feature set and when does he need it ready for development handoff?
